title: Lock v0.5 roadmap
reason: Lock the next v0.5 roadmap after v0.4 adoption hardening, while preserving real benchmark limits, conversation authoring reliability, lock/change-control clarity, factual Homebrew status, and the pre-runtime ni-kernel boundary.
proposed_changes: Add CAP-019 for the v0.5 roadmap after v0.4 adoption hardening.

Record real benchmark data, broader product surfaces, conversation authoring reliability, lock/change-control UX, optional tested Homebrew, optional factual landing page, and separate-package-only downstream integrations as the v0.5 focus.
Add REQ-019, EVAL-023, RISK-016, DEC-015, NG-011, and v0.5 artifacts while preserving prompt-only ni run behavior and the pre-runtime ni-kernel boundary.
risk_impact: Adds a high-severity v0.5 roadmap risk so benchmark, product-surface, Homebrew, landing-page, and downstream integration work cannot drift into runtime claims, false availability, or ni-kernel adapters.
readiness_impact: Expected to remain READY because CAP-019 is accepted with a linked requirement, evaluation, mitigated high-severity risk, artifacts, non-goal, and no blocker questions.
